contenders.handicapper_notes: Boasts a strong local record with 6 wins from 16 starts at ASD. Draws the rail which is highly advantageous on this tight track. Showed good tactical speed last out when dueling and waiting mildly to finish second with a 71 speed figure.

Classy individual shipping in from Century Mile. While he is the class of the field, handicappers must apply caution due to the Century Mile Shipper Trap. His long-striding style and tendency to run wide could be compromised by ASD's tight turns.

Comes off a sharp stalking victory at 6 furlongs on this track, registering a 74 speed figure. He has proven capability at route distances and should sit a perfect stalking trip just off the early leaders.

Note the significant jockey change to Neville Stephenson and weight increase to 125 lbs. This horse possesses early speed and won two back as lone speed, but may face pressure from the inside draw today.

A deep closer who will find the tight ASD turns challenging. He did pass tired rivals last out to finish 4th, but the track bias heavily disadvantages his running style unless a severe pace meltdown occurs.

contenders.handicapper_notes: A classic bullring speed specialist. Draws the rail and possesses high-quality early speed. If she can clear the field early, she will be incredibly difficult to catch on this layout. Speed figures consistently in the high 80s and low 90s.
Struggled to make an impact last out when finishing 6th. Tends to do her best work late, which is a major disadvantage on this track. Needs a fast pace setup to have any chance.
Stumbled at the start last out but still managed to rally wide for 3rd. Possesses decent tactical speed and can sit a good trip if she gets away cleanly from the gate.
Consistent performer at this level. Stalked the duel 3-wide early last out before fading slightly to 4th. Should appreciate a slightly more conservative ride today.
Possesses early speed but draws wide in post 6. Will have to work hard to clear the inside speed, which could leave her vulnerable late on the tight turns.
In sharp form with a solid stalking win and a second-place finish in her last two starts. She has shown great versatility and the ability to handle wide draws effectively.
